description: Verified codex — main cast, user-confirmed data only

entries.name: Bad Ass
entries.bio:
A radical that wants to be left alone

Pessimistic Edgy Philosophical and Political

Is actually a Human who was turned into a donkey by the Gods by accident. (see Cole Butte below)
entries.verbalTics: Laat mij gerust (recurring dismissal), 'k Veronderstel (grudging concession ×2), godverdomme (profanity peak), Eindelijk! (payoff/release ×2 in E6)
entries.relationships: mother left young; despised capitalist father; dreams of escaping to Mechalen; real name Piet Vanscheetvelde; reluctant mentor to the Foal (E6)
entries.note: ''k:17 — heaviest 'k user in cast. godver:4. liggen doen, zever, nen, da conjunction — densest Flemish in cast.

entries.name: Big Ass
entries.bio: Always sees the big picture or puts things into perspective. Yearns for bigger opportunity and responsibility; wants to make an impact.
entries.verbalTics: *oef!* (physical effort ×4), Kameraad (constant address ×7+), size descriptors: mega/gigantische/geweldige
entries.note: kameraad:7, oef:4 — full Ik not 'k; niet dominant over nie

entries.name: Hard Ass
entries.bio: Strong, stoic, and blunt. Willing to make sacrifices to protect the herd.
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad (constant address ×7+), "Om uit de beerput te klimmen, moet er stront aan de hoeven hangen" (motto ×2), "Geen mietje zijn" (×2), ... (contemplative pauses throughout)
entries.note: kameraad:7, motto ×2 (beerput/stront), "Geen mietje zijn" ×2, "Let's go" kept verbatim in Dutch; "Dat meurt hier nog al, man" — strongest Flemish moment

entries.name: Kick Ass
entries.bio: Angry and impulsive. The brother of Sick Ass. Carries lots of shame for hurting Humans.
entries.verbalTics: @#$%&! (5+ times, kept as is), godver(domme) (×3 explicit), Snotje (constant nickname for Sick Ass), VOOR WAT?! (×2), hè (sentence-final emphasis)
entries.relationships: brother of Sick Ass; lost her in E4; carries blood guilt for violence against Humans on Hard Ass's orders
entries.note: kameraad:5; "De Kudde kan mij een WORST WEZEN" (I don't care); "op hoeven en hoeven zitten" (begging); mixed nie/niet; je/jij dominant, ge/gij/uw at emotional peaks

entries.name: Lazy Ass
entries.bio:
A lazy donkey. Very easy going, almost surfer-esque in tone, just here for a good time. Died in the Mine collapse accident 1 year before events of the story started. Mate of Sad Ass.

She is CARE FREE.
entries.verbalTics: "Verveling is Vrijheid" (motto ×2), "weet ge wel?" (ya know? tag ×2), 'k Denk (tentative memory ×3), kleintje (affectionate to Foal), "Later" (Peace out)
entries.relationships: lover of Sad Ass, daughter of Sturdy Ass
entries.note: 'k:9; nie dominant, no "niet"; da conjunction; merci, klapt, nen, "Doe uw goesting" — heavy Flemish. Note: godver:4 not confirmed in available lines

entries.name: Nice Ass
entries.bio: Strong and fast. She loves to plow fields all day. She's energetic, modest, helpful, pure of heart. She would never break a promise.
entries.verbalTics: Oesje! (Golly/Gosh ×5+), Jakkes! (Yikes ×3), Jemig! (Jeepers ×2), Kameraad (address ×7+), "Oude Zak zou niet willen dat we iemand achterlaten" (repeater ×4)
entries.relationships: keeper of Sad Ass's secret (fire); encouraging/maternal to all herd; Thirsty Ass is obsessed with her (not reciprocal)
entries.note: kameraad:7; niet not nie throughout; je/jij consistent (no ge/gij); Oesje/Jakkes/Jemig signature exclamations; potvolkoffie, verdikke as mild oaths

entries.name: Old Ass
entries.bio: Classic Marxist/Leninist leader. Inspires the heard in his lofty speeches.
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad (×7+), EZEL MACHT (ASS POWER, ×2), "Ik wou dat" (wistful regret ×2), ... (dramatic ellipses throughout dying scene), "Jonge Kameraad" (specific address to Trusty/Foal)
entries.dynamics: sage leader, formal oratory, ideological speeches
entries.relationships: leader of the herd, pair-bonded with Sturdy Ass
entries.note: kameraad:7; polsen + klapke (Flemish markers); "Ik wou dat" as emotional signature; EZEL MACHT as catchphrase; niet throughout (no nie)

entries.name: Sad Ass
entries.bio: Sad. Mourning his lover Lazy who died in the mines. Doesn't have direction in life anymore. He was a Mine donkey until he was sold to the Farm after Lazy died, unable to work anymore. He can be erratic and impulsive, taking out his anger on a car and accidentally starting the major fire of Ep2, or leaving the group behind in Ep5 from the Zoo.
entries.verbalTics: *boe-hoe-hoe-hoe* (whimper ×5+), *snik* (lighter cry E3+), *zucht* (sigh ×2), "Ik wou" (regret pattern ×3), "HET IS ALLEMAAL MIJN FOUT" (guilt explosion ×2), trailing ... throughout
entries.note: nie in emotional peaks; ge/gij in E3 private; hallo'kes + Nonkel (Flemish); stuttered speech w-wou/z-zaken; "Ik wou" as regret marker

entries.name: Sick Ass
entries.bio: Generally unwell from working in the mine, and later in the rain. Ends up being the chosen Vassal for the Gods to become the sacred Golden Ass.
entries.relationships: sister of Kick Ass, vessel of the Gods
entries.note: Mostly *HOEST*/*KUCH*; one spoken word: "Omdraaien." (E6); *HOEST* in dramatic contexts, *KUCH* in everyday E3 interactions

entries.name: Slow Ass
entries.bio: Well-intentioned. Slow moving due to having arthritis. Timid, weary, unconfident. Looks up to Trusty.
entries.verbalTics: stutter on Dutch consonants (z-, w-, g-, h-, n- — NOT fixed to B/P like English, adapts to Dutch leading consonant), *oe-oef* (p-phew), *puf puf* (grunt), *snuf snuf* (sniff), trailing b-b-b... stutter gag (E4)
entries.relationships: deep reverence for Trusty; stayed behind to sing Song of Ascension for her (E2); departs with Kick Ass (E4)
entries.note: stutter doesn't map B/P→Dutch; adapts to leading consonant of each Dutch word; one "nie" (E3); "uw/u" as reverent address for Trusty

entries.name: Smart Ass
entries.bio: Self-centred, egotistical, strategist. Always has another backup plan. Always looking out for her own (either self or group). Carries herself with an air of superiority — snooty, condescending, and convinced she's the smartest one in every room.
entries.verbalTics: "Poepsimpel." (Easy. — signature ×3+), ÉÉN/TWEE/DRIE numbered plan sequences (×3 full plans), "EN ONZE JOBS TERUG TE GEVEN!" (rallying cry, ends every plan)
entries.relationships: manipulates herd, looks out for own group
entries.note: Only ABN speaker; "Poepsimpel" is her one deliberate Flemish word; "Da's catchy" — one Flemish contraction slip; "ezelinnekes" — one -ke diminutive

entries.name: Sturdy Ass
entries.bio:
Overprotective mother. She is pair-bonded with Old Ass. She lost her first daughter Lazy in the mine. She is racist against Machines. Can be overbearing a strict.

In the end, she changes her ways and spreads the story of asses.masses to other farm animals towards starting a greater revolution.
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad (×30 — most in cast), "slechte, zielloze, werk-afpakkende, kind-dodende Machines" (anti-machine mantra ×2+), "Bij de Goden!" (exclamation), Veulentje (foal address), ezelenhemelvaartszangderzielen
entries.relationships: pair-bonded with Old Ass, lost daughter Lazy, racist against Machines
entries.note: 't:29 — heaviest contraction user. kameraad:30 — heaviest address user. da:14. Uses "niet" not "nie" despite consistent ge/gij

entries.name: Thirsty Ass
entries.bio: Older, a bit lecherous. Generally positive. Mostly interested in doing whatever Nice Ass is doing. Castrated. Dreams of starting a small business in the form of a Bar, called Bottom's Up
entries.verbalTics: héé (sentence-final, almost every line), JIE-HAAA! (YEEHAW), godver(domme), doeme/gedoemme, amai, *oef*, allez, sie
entries.relationships: obsessed with Nice Ass (her legs, castration regret), close to Big Ass (E3 tunnel convo), loyal herd member, dreams of Bottoms Up bar (→ Poepegaatje)
entries.note: héé in 50+ of 92 Dutch lines — single most dominant feature. da/dadde heavy. Bottoms Up → Poepegaatje. Drink puns: Bronnini, Emmer Ale, Spuugspritz. Zero corpus entries.

entries.name: Trusty Ass
entries.bio: First met as more of a listener than a leader, she is accepted as Old Ass's second in command. When she dies, she longs to be reassigned so that she can become a better leader.
entries.verbalTics: "Ahh!" (startled ×2), "Het is maar.../Dat is..." (observation pattern throughout), "Ooeeeeps!" (Whoops — death line), "Ahum" (Ahem)
entries.dynamics: quiet authority, listener first, steady presence
entries.relationships: second in command to Old Ass; dies in E1 (falls in well); guide/reassigned in Astral Plane (E4)
entries.note: player character — mostly environmental observations; "niet best" (Flemish understatement); "misschien de moment" (E1); "In den beginne" (archaic opener)
